Skip to contents
pakhom 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started
    • Getting Started with pakhom

Package index

Run an Analysis

Core entry points for running the pipeline

run_analysis()
Run the full thematic analysis pipeline
load_config()
Load analysis configuration from YAML file
create_config()
Create a minimal configuration file
config_wizard()
Interactive configuration wizard
config_wizard_app()
Launch the interactive configuration wizard

Configuration

Configuration creation, validation, and defaults

default_config()
Create a default configuration object

Data Loading & Exploration

Load data from SQLite and explore databases

load_data()
Load data from a SQLite database
explore_database()
Explore a SQLite database schema
detect_variable_types()
Detect variable types for dynamic correlation method selection

AI Provider

AI provider abstraction for OpenAI and Anthropic

create_ai_provider()
Create an AI provider client

Pipeline Steps

Individual analysis steps (called by run_analysis)

run_progressive_coding()
Run progressive sequential coding on all entries
create_coding_state()
Create a new progressive coding state
get_analytic_sample()
Get the analytic sample (entries that received at least one code)
analyze_sentiment()
Run batch sentiment analysis on all entries
generate_themes_iterative()
Generate themes through iterative bottom-up merging
cascade_theme_assignments()
Cascade theme assignments from codes to entries deterministically
enrich_themes()
Enrich themes with entry counts, sentiment, and quotes
calculate_correlations()
Calculate correlation matrix with p-values

Themes & Theme Data

Working with ThemeSet objects

create_theme_set()
Create a ThemeSet object (canonical internal representation)
theme_names()
Extract theme names from ThemeSet
n_themes()
Get the number of themes
theme_set_to_tibble()
Convert ThemeSet to tibble for export/inspection
normalize_theme_result()
Normalize raw AI theme output to canonical ThemeSet
prune_empty_themes()
Remove themes with zero assigned entries after enrichment

Checkpoint & Resume

Save and restore pipeline progress

init_checkpoints()
Initialize checkpoint system for a pipeline run

Manuscript Learning

Learn from prior manual thematic analyses

load_previous_studies()
Load all previous studies from a base directory
generate_learning_context()
Generate task-specific learning context from previous analyses
generate_learning_reflection()
Generate AI reflection on what was learned from previous studies

Human Verification

Inter-rater reliability and code verification

run_human_verification()
Run human verification / IRR process
verify_excerpts()
Verify coded excerpts against source text

Report & Export

HTML report, CSV/JSON exports, and QDA-software interoperability

generate_report()
Generate the full HTML analysis report
export_results()
Export all analysis results to files
export_qdpx()
Export coding results to QDPX format

Comparison

Compare results across pipeline runs and across AI models

compare_runs()
Compare the current run against all previous runs
compare_models()
Compare runs that used different AI models for inter-model reliability
list_available_runs()
List available analysis runs
compare_theme_groups()
Compare continuous variables across theme groups using Mann-Whitney U tests

Temporal Analysis

Within-run longitudinal analysis when entries have timestamps

analyze_temporal_patterns()
Analyse temporal patterns in theme prevalence within a single run
generate_temporal_plots()
Generate PNG plots for temporal analysis results

Audit Log

JSONL trail of every AI decision for post-hoc transparency review

init_audit_log()
Initialize the AI decision audit log
close_audit_log()
Close the audit log file connection

Statistical Analysis

Correlation and co-occurrence helpers

aggregate_overall_statistics()
Aggregate overall analysis statistics for report
aggregate_theme_statistics()
Aggregate per-theme statistics for report
test_theme_cooccurrence()
Test theme co-occurrence patterns with chi-square tests of independence
create_theme_network()
Create theme co-occurrence network visualization

Scraper

Reddit data collection

scrape_reddit()
Scrape Reddit subreddits into a SQLite database

Pipeline Integrity

Verify pipeline run integrity

verify_run_integrity()
Verify that a run directory contains all expected output files

Internal Helpers

Internal functions used by the pipeline (not typically called directly)

aggregate_overall_statistics()
Aggregate overall analysis statistics for report
aggregate_theme_statistics()
Aggregate per-theme statistics for report
ai_complete()
High-level AI completion with retry and error handling
ai_complete_fast()
Send a quick completion using the fast/cheap model
analyze_sentiment()
Run batch sentiment analysis on all entries
analyze_temporal_patterns()
Analyse temporal patterns in theme prevalence within a single run
as_coding_results()
Convert ProgressiveCodingState to legacy CodingResults format
calculate_correlations()
Calculate correlation matrix with p-values
cascade_theme_assignments()
Cascade theme assignments from codes to entries deterministically
close_audit_log()
Close the audit log file connection
compare_models()
Compare runs that used different AI models for inter-model reliability
compare_runs()
Compare the current run against all previous runs
compare_theme_groups()
Compare continuous variables across theme groups using Mann-Whitney U tests
compute_coding_benchmarks()
Compute empirical coding benchmarks from parsed QDA codebooks
config_wizard()
Interactive configuration wizard
config_wizard_app()
Launch the interactive configuration wizard
create_ai_provider()
Create an AI provider client
create_coding_state()
Create a new progressive coding state
create_config()
Create a minimal configuration file
create_correlation_plot()
Create correlation plot
create_theme_network()
Create theme co-occurrence network visualization
create_theme_set()
Create a ThemeSet object (canonical internal representation)
default_config()
Create a default configuration object
detect_columns()
Detect and map columns based on platform type
detect_variable_types()
Detect variable types for dynamic correlation method selection
discover_study_folders()
Discover study folders matching a pattern
.THEME_DEFAULTS
Default values for optional theme fields
.THEME_REQUIRED_FIELDS
Required fields for each theme within a ThemeSet
enrich_themes()
Enrich themes with entry counts, sentiment, and quotes
explore_database()
Explore a SQLite database schema
export_qdpx()
Export coding results to QDPX format
export_results()
Export all analysis results to files
export_theme_entry_csvs()
Export CSV files for each theme's entries
extract_manuscript_sections()
Extract structured sections from manuscript text
extract_significant()
Extract significant correlations as tidy tibble
find_latest_run()
Find the most recent run folder in the results directory
find_resume_point()
Determine the last completed step for resume
generate_ai_synthesis()
Generate AI-powered executive summary and conclusion
generate_downloads_section()
Generate downloads appendix section
generate_insights()
Generate AI insights from correlation findings
generate_learning_context()
Generate task-specific learning context from previous analyses
generate_learning_reflection()
Generate AI reflection on what was learned from previous studies
generate_report()
Generate the full HTML analysis report
generate_run_id()
Generate a unique run ID based on timestamp
generate_temporal_plots()
Generate PNG plots for temporal analysis results
generate_theme_detail_section()
Generate a theme detail section for appendix
generate_themes_iterative()
Generate themes through iterative bottom-up merging
get_analytic_sample()
Get the analytic sample (entries that received at least one code)
get_emotion_interpretation()
Get interpretation text for an emotion
hash_config()
Compute a hash of a config file for change detection
init_audit_log()
Initialize the AI decision audit log
init_checkpoints()
Initialize checkpoint system for a pipeline run
interpret_correlations()
Interpret correlation results for reporting
list_available_runs()
List available analysis runs
list_checkpoints()
List available checkpoints with metadata
load_and_combine_tables()
Load and combine multiple tables from a SQLite database
load_checkpoint()
Load checkpoint for a step
load_config()
Load analysis configuration from YAML file
load_data()
Load data from a SQLite database
load_previous_studies()
Load all previous studies from a base directory
log_ai_decision()
Record a single AI decision in the audit log
make_anchor_id()
Create an HTML anchor ID from a string
make_safe_filename()
Create a safe filename from a string
n_themes()
Get the number of themes
normalize_theme_result()
Normalize raw AI theme output to canonical ThemeSet
parse_codebook()
Parse a QDA software codebook export (NVivo, ATLAS.ti, MAXQDA, or generic)
parse_json_safely()
Parse JSON safely with automatic repair for truncated/malformed responses
parse_manuscript()
Parse a finalized themes manuscript (DOCX or PDF)
parse_raw_data_files()
Parse raw data DOCX files and extract metadata from filenames
prepare_correlation_data()
Prepare data for correlation analysis
preprocess_text()
Preprocess text data for analysis
print(<AIProvider>)
Print method for AIProvider
print(<CheckpointManager>)
Print method for CheckpointManager
print(<ComparisonResult>)
Print method for ComparisonResult
print(<ThematicConfig>)
Print method for ThematicConfig
print(<ThemeSet>)
Print method for ThemeSet
prune_empty_themes()
Remove themes with zero assigned entries after enrichment
run_analysis()
Run the full thematic analysis pipeline
run_human_verification()
Run human verification / IRR process
run_progressive_coding()
Run progressive sequential coding on all entries
save_checkpoint()
Save checkpoint at a given pipeline step
save_partial_checkpoint()
Save partial checkpoint within a step (for long-running batch operations)
scrape_reddit()
Scrape Reddit subreddits into a SQLite database
standardize_data()
Standardize data to common schema
summarize_audit_log()
Summarize the AI decision audit log
test_theme_cooccurrence()
Test theme co-occurrence patterns with chi-square tests of independence
pakhom-package pakhom
pakhom: AI-Assisted Reflexive Thematic Analysis
theme_names()
Extract theme names from ThemeSet
theme_set_to_tibble()
Convert ThemeSet to tibble for export/inspection
truncate_text()
Truncate text to specified length with ellipsis
validate_config()
Validate configuration completeness and correctness
verify_excerpts()
Verify coded excerpts against source text
verify_run_integrity()
Verify that a run directory contains all expected output files
compute_dynamic_batches()
Compute dynamic batch indices based on token budget
compute_embeddings()
Compute text embeddings via AI provider
estimate_tokens()
Estimate token count for text
generate_saturation_plot()
Generate saturation curve plot
`%||%`
Null-coalescing operator (re-export from rlang)
review_progressive_codebook()
Export progressive codebook for researcher review
review_themes()
Export theme review sheet and apply modifications on resume
safe_progress_bar()
Create a progress bar that works in non-interactive/background mode
validate_class()
Validate that an object inherits from a given class
validate_data_columns()
Validate that a data frame has required columns
validate_provider()
Validate that an AI provider is properly constructed
